claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, manual assistive-technology, or distribution parity claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: numbered native link with optional source note
semantics.rolePolicy: Unsafe schemes become non-interactive unavailable text instead of a disabled link.

keyboard.behavior: Reaches safe citation links in document order.
Activates the focused safe citation link with native browser behavior.

nonColor: Unsafe citations receive an explicit unavailable accessible name; stable numbering remains visible.
responsive: Source detail wraps and uses logical layout without clipping long titles or excerpts.
security: javascript, data, protocol-relative, malformed and credential-bearing URLs never become anchors. External links use noopener and noreferrer.
consumerResponsibilities: Verify source trust, accuracy, licensing and retention.
Use stable positive numbering within the surrounding response.
Do not treat a safe URL scheme as proof that the destination is trustworthy.
